nasb.text: “You shall make a mercy seat of pure gold, two and a half cubits long and one and a half cubits wide.

esv.text: “You shall make a mercy seat of pure gold. Two cubits and a half shall be its length, and a cubit and a half its breadth.

cnv.text: 你要用純金做施恩座，長一百一十公分，寬六十六公分。

ccb.text: 要用纯金造一个施恩座，长一点一米，宽六十六厘米。
